item.title: Samsung LED Curved-Display S27C390EAU - 68 cm 27" - 1920 x 1080 Full HD
item.description: There’s a deal Samsung LED Curved-Display S27C390EAU - 68 cm 27" - 1920 x 1080 Full HD here: ℹ️: Voltage: 240 volt Pakketgewicht: 7.14 kg Hardware interface: Displayport,HDMI Afmetingen pakket: 19.2 L x 45.2 B x 69 H cm 🛒 Buy it now!!
